_comment: Locked hyperparameters for the topic_modeling phase. embedding_model_id is overwritten by the bake-off in Stage 1 (see embed.py::run_embedding_bakeoff). All other values are immutable for the full corpus run to ensure reproducibility across researchers.
_embedding_decision: Methodology override 2026-05-06: bake-off rule's verdict was MiniLM (won NPMI by 0.042), but XLM-R-Large dominates on outlier_rate (0.000 vs 0.137) and silhouette (+0.189 vs -0.069) on the SLU pilot. Negative silhouette for MiniLM indicates significant cluster overlap; XLM-R-L's tighter, denser clusters matter more for downstream event detection than the marginal NPMI difference. See validation/embedding_bakeoff_report.md and action_log.md ACTION-006.

xlm_roberta_large.name: FacebookAI/xlm-roberta-large
xlm_roberta_large.source: User-prompted alternative; supports Cosme & De Leon (2024) multilingual claim

umap._comment: n_components reverted to 5 on 2026-05-06 (ACTION-028) after empirical sweep showed it was NOT the bottleneck — at n_components=30 the grid still picked 2 clusters because the SCORING preferred few-but-tight over many. Real fix is in the HDBSCAN grid floors (mcs=10, ms=3) plus a min cluster-count constraint in selection.

hdbscan_grid._comment: Grid floors lowered on 2026-05-06 (ACTION-028) after empirical sweep on SLU showed mcs=20+ caps n_clusters at 2-4 because XLM-R-L embeddings have flat density structure. At mcs=10 with ms=3, configs reach 8-22 clusters with low outliers. min_cluster_count_floor (added below) is the hard guardrail.

_topic_count_comment: GRANULAR MODE (ACTION-053): target raised from 15 to 30, threshold from 25 to 60. Rationale: matches the pilot SLU study's behavior (10k+ posts produced 40+ topics including ones with ~10 posts). Thesis discussion benefits from fine-grained topic analysis even if some clusters are small. reduce_topics now only fires on EXTREME over-fragmentation (>60 topics), preserving granular signal for typical corpora. To switch back to merged mode (≤15 topics for cleaner overview), set target_topic_count: 15 and reduce_topics_threshold: 25.
